json_data.title: Computational Models of Human Memory
json_data.reason: This topic delves deeper into a core component of cognitive architectures, exploring how memory systems like working memory, semantic memory, and episodic memory are represented and interact within computational frameworks.

json_data.title: Neuro-symbolic AI Architectures
json_data.reason: Building on the comparison between symbolic and deep learning AI, this topic explores advanced hybrid architectures that integrate both approaches to overcome limitations and enhance cognitive modeling capabilities.

json_data.title: Architectural Principles for Artificial General Intelligence (AGI)
json_data.reason: This topic investigates the fundamental design challenges and theoretical frameworks required to build cognitive architectures capable of achieving human-level general intelligence, extending the ambitions of current models.
